creator: wblock@wonkity.com
text:
devel/arduino pkg-plist contains two spurious .orig files from patches.  This patch removes them.  Found by Craig Leres.

Fix: Apply patch.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: % make deinstall
===>  Deinstalling for devel/arduino
===>   Deinstalling arduino-0022
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/arduino/hardware/arduino/bootloaders/atmega8ATmegaBOOT.c.orig' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/arduino/hardware/arduino/cores/arduino/wiring_private.h.orig' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list is incorrectly specified?)
